headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Ameren, Raises Price Target to $118
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Byrd   maintains Ameren (NYSE:AEE) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $115 to $118.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Ameren, Raises Price Target to $118

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Ameren, Lowers Price Target to $119
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains Ameren (NYSE:AEE) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $121 to $119.
